title: ceratozamia huastecorum
intro: Ceratozamia huastecorum, also known as the Huastec cycad, is a species of cycad, a type of ancient seed plant that has been around for over 200 million years. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ceratozamia huastecorum include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and leaves are often dried and made into teas, capsules, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
